ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( !IsNew(), RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Related_Agreement', $Profile.Name != 'System Administrator', AND(NOT($Permission.RE_Admin_Team), NOT($Permission.PMD_Permission), NOT($Permission.PM_Permission)), ISPICKVAL(Parent_Agreement__r.Agreement_Type__c,'SDP') , OR(ISCHANGED( Version__c ), ISCHANGED( Revision__c ), ISCHANGED( Project__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Can't modify Version, Revision and Project on Related Agreement. Please contact Administrator for more information.
